name: @panda-chat-widget/loader

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && vite build && vite build --mode classic && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: rm -rf ../../.cache/loader-test-core && (pnpm build && vite build --mode test-core && tsc -p test/declarations/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && node --test "test/**/*.test.mjs"); status=$?; rm -rf ../../.cache/loader-test-core; exit $status
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build

description: Lifecycle SDK core with side-effect-free ESM factory and classic global loader.
